projects.title: Hyper-Casual Game Collection
projects.shortDescription: Collection of hyper-casual mobile games with polished mechanics and ad integration
projects.description:
A comprehensive collection of hyper-casual mobile games developed during my tenure at OZI Technology. These games feature intuitive one-tap mechanics, colorful visuals, and optimized performance for a wide range of Android devices.

Each game in this collection underwent multiple iterations based on player feedback and retention metrics. The games were optimized for 60fps performance even on low-end devices.

projects.title: Android Game Portfolio
projects.shortDescription: Multiple Android mobile games with unique mechanics and engaging gameplay
projects.description:
A diverse portfolio of Android games developed for various clients and internal projects. Each game showcases different gameplay mechanics, from puzzle games to action shooters.

These projects demonstrate my ability to adapt to different game genres and deliver polished experiences within tight deadlines.

projects.title: Ad Integration Framework
projects.shortDescription: Custom ad mediation framework with analytics integration
projects.description:
A robust ad integration framework built for Unity that simplifies the process of adding advertisements to mobile games. This framework provides a unified interface for multiple ad networks and includes built-in analytics.

The framework supports automatic eCPM optimization and A/B testing for ad placements to maximize revenue.
features: Unified ad API for all networks
